description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that runs git submodule init, git submodule update, and docker build -t pdp11 . In the deploy stage add a job named deploy heroku that runs heroku container:login, heroku container:push web --app pdp11, and heroku container:release web --app pdp11 to push the Docker image to Heroku. Use the default runner image (no explicit Docker image or services) and no extra caches or artifacts, and let the jobs run on their respective stages.
